title: REPITA A FRASE
translate: Você gostaria de um pouco de água?

title: These are ______  of the pictures I've painted recently.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: These are some of the pictures I've painted recently
translate: Estes são alguns dos quadros que eu pintei recentemente

title: We need tomatoes, are there ______ in the fridge?
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: We need tomatoes, are there any in the fridge?
a: We need tomatoes, are there any in the fridge
b: We need tomatoes are there any in the fridge
translate: Nós precisamos de tomates, tem algum na geladeira?

title: ________ of the answers were right, your grade was zero.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: None of the answers were right, your grade was zero
a: None of the answers were right, your grade was 0
b: None of the answers were right your grade was 0
c: None of the answers were right your grade was zero
translate: NENHUMA DAS RESPOSTAS ESTAVAM CERTAS, SUA NOTA FOI 0

title: We need to get more coffee, there isn't _____  left.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: We need to get more coffee, there isn't any left
a: We need to get more coffee there isn't any left
translate: Nós precisamos buscar mais café, não sobrou nenhum

title: Is there _____ wine left or have we finished the bottle?
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Is there any wine left or have we finished the bottle?
a: Is there any wine left or have we finished the bottle
translate: Sobrou algum vinho ou nós terminamos a garrafa?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Yes, there's still some wine left
a: Yes there's still some wine left
b: Yes there's still some wine left
translate: Sim, ainda sobrou algum vinho

title: REPITA A FRASE
translate: Você tem um pouco d'água ?

title: Would you like _____ more orange juice?
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Would you like some more orange juice?
a: Would you like some more orange juice
translate: Você gostaria de mais algum suco de laranja?

title: I won’t be able to do it by myself. I will need ___ help.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: I won't be able to do it by myself. I will need some help
a: I won't be able to do it by myself I will need some help
translate: Eu não conseguirei faze-lo sozinho. Eu precisarei de alguma ajuda

title: I am sorry but I can’t pay. I haven’t got ___ money on me.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: I am sorry but I can’t pay. I haven’t got any money on me
a: I am sorry but I can’t pay I haven’t got any money on me
translate: Me desculpe, mas eu não posso pagar. Eu não tenho nenhum dinheiro comigo

title: Susan asked her parents for money again. But they had _______.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Susan asked her parents for money again. But they had none
a: Susan asked her parents for money again But they had none
translate: Susan pediu dinheiro para os seus pais de novo. Mas eles não tinham nenhum

title: REPITA A FRASE
translate: Você gostaria de um pouco de queijo?

title: REPITA A FRASE
translate: Não, eu não quero nenhum

title: _____ of my children wanted to do sports activities. Not even one!
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: None of my children wanted to do sports activities. Not even one!
a: None of my children wanted to do sports activities. Not even one
b: None of my children wanted to do sports activities Not even one
translate: Nenhum dos meus filhos quis fazer atividades esportivas. Nem sequer um!

title: Remember to bring back the change, if there is _____.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Remember to bring back the change, if there is any
a: Remember to bring back the change if there is any
translate: Lembre-se de trazer de volta o troco, se tiver algum

title: We looked at some package holidays, but  ______ of them were good.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: We looked at some package holidays, but none of them were good
a: We looked at some package holidays but none of them were good
translate: Nós olhamos alguns pacotes de viagens, mas nenhum deles eram bons

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Do you have any English friends?
a: Do you have any English friends
translate: Você tem alguns amigos ingleses?

title: ________ of you are very good in English. Congratulations!
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Some of you are very good in English. Congratulations!
a: Some of you are very good in English. Congratulations
b: Some of you are very good in English Congratulations
translate: Alguns de vocês são muito bons em inglês. Parabéns!

title: It's great that _______ of my friends smoke. We’re all healthy.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: It's great that none of my friends smoke. We’re all healthy
a: It's great that none of my friends smoke We’re all healthy
translate: É ótimo que nenhum dos meus amigos fumem. Nós somos todos saudáveis

title: I never have ______ luck with the lottery.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: I never have any luck with the lottery
translate: Eu nunca tenho alguma sorte na loteria

title: There might be ______ soup left on the stove.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: There might be some soup left on the stove
translate: Pode haver alguma sopa no fogão

title: Unfortunately, _____ of the chairs were free.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Unfortunately, none of the chairs were free
a: Unfortunately none of the chairs were free
translate: Infelizmente, nenhuma das cadeiras estavam livres

title: We didn’t like the shoes. We didn’t buy ______.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: We didn’t like the shoes. We didn’t buy any
a: We didn’t like the shoes We didn’t buy any
translate: Nós não gostamos dos sapatos. Nós não compramos

title: Have ______ spare parts arrived? Yes, ______ arrived this morning.
subtitle: ESCOLHA A OPÇÃO CORRETA?

title: REPITA A FRASE
answer: Have any spare parts arrived? Yes, some arrived this morning
a: Have any spare parts arrived? Yes some arrived this morning
b: Have any spare parts arrived Yes some arrived this morning
translate: Algumas peças sobressalentes chegaram? Sim, algumas chegaram esta manhã
